name: @birdmania1/namecheap-mcp
description: Check domain availability across 600+ TLDs without leaving Claude

scripts.postinstall:
node -e "console.log('
✅ Namecheap MCP installed!

⚠️  IMPORTANT: You must configure your Namecheap API credentials.

Quick setup:

1. Ask Claude: "Visit https://api.ipify.org and tell me my IP address"
2. Enable Namecheap API and whitelist that IP
   https://www.namecheap.com → Profile → Tools → API Access
3. Ask Claude to add credentials to ~/.claude/settings.json

Full instructions:
https://github.com/ziggythebot/namecheap-mcp#readme
')"

author: b1rdmania
